rows.label: tev045101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Enneana about Bias clothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Enneana about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Enneana what she
thinks of human clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Enneana if the Bias have
considered selling their gear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Enneana what she
thinks of human clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Enneana about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL2011
rows.name:
Ask Enneana what she
thinks of human clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Enneana about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL3011
rows.name:
Ask Enneana what she
thinks of human clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Enneana about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0001
rows.name: Cavern Clan likes Growth battle suits.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0002
rows.name:
But Tree Clan are true Bias. We wear clothes
made from skin and bones of beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mira has many beasts like simius and
terebras. They yield many such materials.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I should use these materials. I would
make Bias clothes unique to Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0009
rows.name: Do Earth aliens love?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0010
rows.name:
There is male who has stolen my
heart. His very presence warms me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0011
rows.name:
While we were in Growth captivity,
he alone was source of kindness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0012
rows.name: How do I tell him this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Should I give him gift from heart?
Will he then see love I hold for him?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0018
rows.name:
I went to your Armory Alley. Saw many
fascinating Earth clothing styles.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0019
rows.name:
But garment you call
"swimsuit" caught my eye![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0020
rows.name:
It makes wearer beautiful AND is waterproof.
You could look good in rainstorm![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Inventor of "swimsuit"
should get many honors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0022
rows.name:
If only Bias I love could
see me in "swimsuit"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0027
rows.name:
Bias has no better armor or
weapon than own hardened flesh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0028
rows.name:
We have no custom of
crafting like other aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0029
rows.name:
You make fine clothes. So do Ma-non.
I am shamed I cannot do same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG0030
rows.name:
But I do clean and wash better than most
Bias! Maybe I will help in this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Is it true Earth alien females wear
special garments for weddings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1002
rows.name:
I watched moving picture of "wedding
dress." I wanted to learn about
making Earth-alien clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1003
rows.name:
White dress is so different from Bias
horn-ring of betrothal and bone crowns![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1004
rows.name:
Wife of Nemard looked beautiful
in white dress. It made me cry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1005
rows.name:
I hope to wear such dress someday.
And to be married to one I love...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1010
rows.name: Heptana and Nemard make perfect couple.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1011
rows.name:
Gentle Bias like me never
had chance with him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1012
rows.name: *siiiiiigh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG1013
rows.name:
But Nemard's happiness gives me
happiness. I am ready to move on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2001
rows.name:
Is it true Earth alien females wear
special garments for weddings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2002
rows.name:
I watched moving picture of "wedding
dress." I wanted to learn about
making Earth-alien clothes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2003
rows.name: So lovely! I am in awe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2004
rows.name: I hope to have daughter one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2005
rows.name:
When she takes mate, I will
make fine white dress for her.
She will shine like sun![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2010
rows.name:
Other day, Nemard brought
me lovely jewel as gift.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2011
rows.name: I could not stop crying from joy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2012
rows.name:
If Nemard's next gift to me is child,
I might wash whole city away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG2013
rows.name:
True happiness is force of nature.
Exciting, but also terrifying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3001
rows.name:
I went to your cathedral earlier. Saw
mysterious ritual for BLADE who died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3002
rows.name:
Everyone wore thin black
clothes. It was strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3003
rows.name:
When Bias bury dead, we wear
proper protection in case of
beast or Cavern Clan attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3004
rows.name:
Otherwise, funeral can end
with more funerals. We would
never wear such flimsy rags.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3009
rows.name:
I realized something when I saw
Nemard grieve Grandfather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3010
rows.name:
I cannot always weep and expect
him to hold family together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3011
rows.name:
I must find strength as
Bias female and mother.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045101_MSG3012
rows.name:
I will become great pillar. Strong
as oak. Then we will build family
to make Grandfather proud![ST:wait ]
